articles.title: Duck boat overturns in Cambridge, injuring 11 people
articles.description:
The amphibious tour vehicle flipped on Saturday while being towed from the Charles River after experiencing a mechanical issue on the water.

The post Duck boat overturns in Cambridge, injuring 11 people appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Duck boat overturned in Cambridge on Saturday, injuring 11 people.
The vehicle experienced a mechanical issue while being towed from the Charles River.
Local authorities are investigating the incident to ensure safety for future tours.

articles.title: Longtime Bruins announcer Jack Edwards starting to find his voice again with help from AI
articles.description:
Edwards emphasizes that he is wary of artificial intelligence on most fronts, but appreciates seeing at least one benefit firsthand.

The post Longtime Bruins announcer Jack Edwards starting to find his voice again with help from AI appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins announcer Jack Edwards uses AI to regain his voice after health issues.
Edwards has been a key voice for the Bruins for over 20 years.
Boston residents benefit from his return, enhancing local sports broadcasting.

articles.title: Why JJ Peterka was worth the price of 2 1st-round picks for Bruins
articles.description:
"I think when I'm at [my] best, I can score — basically from everywhere."

The post Why JJ Peterka was worth the price of 2 1st-round picks for Bruins appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins traded 2 first-round picks for forward JJ Peterka on June 27, 2026.
Peterka aims to enhance Bruins' scoring ability with his versatile offensive skills.
Local fans anticipate increased competitiveness in the NHL following this significant acquisition.

articles.title: MassHealth will stop covering weight-loss drugs next week
articles.description:
The change will leave an estimated 22,000 MassHealth members on the hook to pay out of pocket for the pricy GLP-1s and other anti-obesity drugs.

The post MassHealth will stop covering weight-loss drugs next week appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: MassHealth will discontinue coverage for weight-loss drugs starting next week.
Approximately 22,000 members will face out-of-pocket costs for GLP-1 medications.
Boston residents relying on these drugs may experience financial strain and health impacts.

articles.title: Here’s the 7 prospects Bruins added on Day 2 of 2026 NHL Draft
articles.description:
The Bruins added two goalies and several skilled wingers in the 2026 NHL Draft.

The post Here’s the 7 prospects Bruins added on Day 2 of 2026 NHL Draft appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins selected seven prospects, including two goalies and skilled wingers, on June 27, 2026.
The draft aims to strengthen the team's roster for future seasons, enhancing local fan engagement.
Improved player development could lead to a more competitive Bruins team for Boston residents.

articles.title: Native Venezuelan Willson Contreras speaks on devastating earthquakes: ‘I always keep Venezuela in my heart’
articles.description:
The death toll from two separate 7-plus magnitude earthquakes in Venezuela rose to 1,430 Saturday afternoon, according to the Associated Press.

The post Native Venezuelan Willson Contreras speaks on devastating earthquakes: ‘I always keep Venezuela in my heart’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two earthquakes in Venezuela killed 1,430 people as of Saturday afternoon.
Boston Red Sox player Willson Contreras expresses solidarity with his home country.
Local Venezuelan community in Boston may organize support efforts for earthquake victims.
